ddls:
CREATE TABLE "loan_pools" (
  "pool_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan pool */,
  "pool_identifier" TEXT /* Identifier for the loan pool */,
  "servicing_fee" REAL /* Servicing fee associated with the pool */,
  "g_fee" REAL /* Guarantee fee for the loans in the pool */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the loan pool was created */,
  "maturity_date" TEXT /* Expected maturity date of the loan pool */,
  "total_loan_amount" REAL /* Total amount of all loans in the pool */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the loan pool (e.g., active, closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pool_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loans" (
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan */,
  "pool_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the loan pool the loan belongs to */,
  "loan_amount" REAL /* Loan amount for the mortgage */,
  "interest_rate" REAL /* Interest rate of the loan */,
  "security_coupon" REAL /* Coupon rate of the security associated with the loan */,
  "borrower_name" TEXT /* Name of the borrower */,
  "borrower_ssn" TEXT /* Social Security Number (SSN) of the borrower (encrypted for security) */,
  "loan_term" INTEGER /* Term of the loan in years */,
  "origination_date" TEXT /* Date when the loan was originated */,
  "loan_status" TEXT /* Current status of the loan (e.g., current, delinquent, defaulted) */,
  "property_address" TEXT /* Address of the property associated with the loan */,
  "property_value" REAL /* Appraised value of the property */,
  "lender_name" TEXT /* Name of the lender */,
  "loan_type" TEXT /* Type of the loan (e.g., fixed-rate, adjustable-rate) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loans_pool_id FOREIGN KEY ("pool_id") REFERENCES loan_pools ("pool_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "servicing_costs" (
  "cost_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each servicing cost entry */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the loan associated with the servicing cost */,
  "servicing_spread" REAL /* Spread for the servicing of the loan */,
  "cost_date" TEXT /* Date when the servicing cost was recorded */,
  "cost_amount" REAL /* Amount of the servicing cost */,
  "cost_description" TEXT /* Description of the servicing cost */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cost_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_servicing_costs_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loans ("loan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis entry */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the loan being analyzed */,
  "weighted_average_spread" REAL /* Weighted average spread for the loan based on servicing costs */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  "credit_score" INTEGER /* Credit score of the borrower */,
  "risk_rating" TEXT /* Risk rating of the loan (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "profit_margin" REAL /* Profit margin for the loan */,
  "default_probability" REAL /* Probability of default for the loan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_analysis_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loans ("loan_id")
)
